内部資料—非公表（FIEA適用）／Board Memorandum: Project Lantern
Issuer: Kitanami Sensors KK（Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market issuer）
Proposed acquisition: 51% stake in Harusora Capital Partners GK via Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) signed 2026-06-28; consideration JPY 7.8 billion.
Embargo: TDnet filing not before 2026-07-05 10:00 JST; draft IR note to be circulated to Ms. Aya Kurose-san (Investor Relations).
MAC/MAE clause: seller accepts MAE limited to target revenue decline exceeding 20%; at present no MAC has occurred and no MAE threshold is expected to be triggered.
This memo includes tender-offer facts contemplated under FIEA Article 27-2 and is restricted from external distribution; no press or social posts until embargo.
APPI/My Number handling: do not request or store My Number; use internal identifiers only (e.g., Employee Code ES-10492 for Ms. Aya Kurose-san), and minimize personal information per 個人情報保護法.
Contact: legal@kitanami-sensors.co.jp; compliance hotline +81-70-5555-0140; Minato office: 5-12-3 Shiosai, Minato-ku, Tokyo 101-1234.
Definitive agreements checklist: SPA executed; Transitional Services Agreement draft due 2026-07-01; Board resolution per Companies Act notarization by 2026-07-02.
Financing: Midoriyama Bank provisional commitment JPY 5.0 billion at 1.2% floating; leverage covenant cap 3.5x net debt/EBITDA; no dividend restriction beyond 30% payout.
Internal research note: estimated synergies JPY 1.1–1.4 billion over 24 months; integration costs JPY 320 million; expected EPS dilution ~3% in FY2027 then accretion.
Public-source reference: our 2024 sustainability brochure already outlined a generic M&A strategy and is stale, non-specific, and not deal-confirmatory.
lowercase pm: todo finalize redlines, book conference room, confirm translator, schedule spa-day vouchers for employee wellness on friday, avoid chat leaks.
If undisclosed enumerated material facts leak prior to embargo, prepare corrective TDnet notice and consider requesting a temporary trading halt per TSE Timely Disclosure rules.
